prestazioni: Engine: 9A1 4.0L Flat-6 (991.1 GT3) or 9A2 4.0L Flat-6 (991.2 GT3) with a Manthey Racing MRX-012 ECU remap, optimizing ignition timing and fuel maps for 550+ HP (stock: 500 HP) while retaining the 9,000 RPM redline. Includes a custom titanium Akrapovič Evolution Line exhaust system with 4-2-1 headers and a straight-pipe center section to reduce backpressure by 30%.

Forced Induction (Optional): Single-turbo conversion using a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold, 1,000cc ID1000 injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank to support 700+ HP on E85. Paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom intercooler setup with a PWR 4.5-core front-mount unit.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and custom valving for the 991 GT3’s rear-wheel steering system. Includes a Manthey Racing GT3-spec front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and a Tarett Engineering rear sway bar (22mm adjustable) to eliminate body roll. Polyurethane bushings from 034Motorsport replace all factory rubber mounts for sharper chassis response.
estetica: Aerodynamics: RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) 991 GT3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, a ducktail spoiler, and a front splitter extension. Includes a custom 991 GT3-specific rear diffuser from 9ff with integrated gurney flaps for increased downforce. Side skirts are replaced with TechArt GTstreet R carbon fiber units for improved airflow management.

Wheels & Brakes: BBS FI-R 19x12.5 +25 front and 19x13 +30 rear wheels with custom center-lock adapters, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30/19 front, 325/30/19 rear). Brake system upgraded to a full AP Racing Radi-CAL setup with 405mm front and 380mm rear carbon-ceramic rotors, 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers, and custom stainless steel braided lines.

Interior & Exterior Details: Full carbon fiber interior from VAD (Vorsteiner) including door cards, center console, and dashboard trim. Seats replaced with Recaro Pole Position II carbon fiber shells with custom Alcantara upholstery and Schroth 6-point harnesses. Exterior features a custom matte Graphite Grey wrap with gloss black accents on the mirrors, grilles, and rear badge. LED taillights from LUX HID with sequential turn signals.
